goal: Conduct a strict forensic audit of v10 microstructure overlay results to confirm or reject their validity before any further research.
global_constraints: Immutable reference: active-signal-v1@1 only; never modify baseline parameters, thresholds, features, or execution logic.
No new features, new directional scouts, early-cuts, or label changes are permitted in v11.
All comparisons must use identical train / selection-OOS / lockbox windows (same-window truth only).
Lockbox must never be used to choose thresholds, labels, or model hyper-parameters.
Short-only, long-only, and combined veto must be tested in separate runs; identical deltas across all three must be explained, not accepted.
Rule-based overlay must be tested before model-backed overlay.
PROMOTE status is only valid if v10 survives the entire forensic cycle.

slices.title: Freeze and forensic-cycle setup
slices.hypothesis: Lock v11 into audit-only mode and register the immutable reference, audit axes, and open-items checklist.
slices.objective: Lock v11 into audit-only mode and register the immutable reference, audit axes, and open-items checklist.
success_criteria: Dedicated v11 audit project exists with immutable reference frozen and full open-items register created.
evidence_requirements: Dedicated v11 audit project exists with immutable reference frozen and full open-items register created.

slices.title: Exact reproduction of v10 from scratch
slices.hypothesis: Reproduce the v10 result without any manual adjustments or prior knowledge to establish a clean baseline truth.
slices.objective: Reproduce the v10 result without any manual adjustments or prior knowledge to establish a clean baseline truth.
success_criteria: Reproduction verdict is recorded: reproduced exactly, partially reproduced, or not reproduced.
evidence_requirements: Reproduction verdict is recorded: reproduced exactly, partially reproduced, or not reproduced.

slices.title: Reference integrity audit
slices.hypothesis: Resolve the core contradiction in v10: lockbox baseline is listed as @3 instead of the declared @1.
slices.objective: Resolve the core contradiction in v10: lockbox baseline is listed as @3 instead of the declared @1.
success_criteria: Clear verdict: @1 == @3 or @1 != @3 with documented evidence.
evidence_requirements: Clear verdict: @1 == @3 or @1 != @3 with documented evidence.
